title: Group By on the Epic's column should sort the groups in order of the Epic End Dates.
excerpt: Our Dev team works across multiple epics, (not using typical sprints) so I want to show all the tasks, grouped by the Epics they are assigned to.  But those Epics (groups) end up in a non specific order.  It’s not alphab…

posts.author: Lowell-K16 (Lowell Vande Kamp)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our Dev team works across multiple epics, (not using typical sprints) so I want to show all the tasks, grouped by the Epics they are assigned to. But those Epics (groups) end up in a non specific order. It’s not alphabetic, and it doesn’t appear to be based on any of the Epic dates.

Because the Group BY filed I chose is Epic … there are dates available on the roadmap that should be used for the ordering of the “groups”.

Support has already confirmed …

I just recently received an update from our monday-Dev product expert, and we can confirm that Sorting and grouping by a connect board column is a known limitation of using the “group by” feature for a connect board column does not put the groups in the right order
